storyInfo: Sky Jagger exposes Gordon Tannen to Gustave, Gordon's old superior, but is instead taken into custody. Nasti forfeits Rhine's engineering control to protect Sky Jagger and the unemployed testers. Meanwhile, Gordon coerces Ferne and Oakley into a secret deal.

attributes.content: I said, you can't go in.
attributes.name: Secretary

attributes.content: And I said I'm with Rhine Lab. I know the access rules for Propeller Paradise facilities better than you do, and no special permission is required to visit Cloud. It's a restaurant.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: You would be correct under normal circumstances, but there is an important guest here right now.
attributes.name: Secretary

attributes.content: Let him in. I think this young man's looking for me.
I take it the debriefing on the Rhine Vivarium incident is done?
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: Nothing gets past you.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: I just happen to know a few people who are committed to Columbia's great project here.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: Including Gordon Tannen?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: I guess you're not here to try to recoup Rhine's losses.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: There isn't enough time before the exhibition now, even with emergency funding.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Please take a look at this inspection report.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: A tech startup solved a technical flaw that was discovered during inspections and received permission to stay on Propeller Paradise... what's the problem?
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: Lucky Cystybeast never passed the re-check. They have to leave Propeller Paradise today, according to the rules.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: But I just saw their owner and discovered that they solved the energy problem that had plagued them for months.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: On the eve of the exhibition. Deadlines, science, miracles... classic potato chip flavors, so to speak.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: No, look at this page—
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: I focused on several components that are not involved in standard inspection, and found that their output is more than ten times the standard values. Well, to put it in simpler terms—
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: You don't need to explain technical terms to me. I wrote the Manual of Columbian Originium Component Standards you're carrying.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: Do you mean to say that Lucky Cystybeast 'invented' power components far exceeding national standards in the span of a few hours?
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: Invented? They don't have the chops for that. I think someone transplanted a non-Columbian heart into that failure.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: You know the rules of Propeller Paradise. All Terran eyes are on our progress in levitation technology. All the parts involved must be made in Columbia to ensure security.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: I'm not accusing the ATAO of negligence.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: No ordinary officer could have let a corporation dodge Rhine's regular and random inspections, unless someone manipulated the Engineering Section's inspection order.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Coincidentally, Director Lunorey came to an agreement with a certain official...
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Gordon Tannen.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: He would stop at nothing to tie Rhine's hands, because we are the true original proponents of Propeller Paradise, and the Engineering Section is a pair of eyes that could uncover his secret at any time.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: So you're speculating that Gordon Tannen has been running a smuggling operation behind the scenes?
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: That is a serious accusation, young man.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: And it's why I had to come to you, sir.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Until Propeller Paradise gets to D.C., you are the only one in the position to deal with your 'diligent' subordinate.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: I'm curious. Does your supervisor know about this?
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: Things wouldn't have come to this, if Director Lunorey did anything...
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Good.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: What do you mean?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: You're a sharp, brave young man. Nasti wouldn't have let you stay behind to spend time with me if she knew.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: Sir—
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: I'm the only one in the position to deal with Gordon... an interesting way to put it. He used to butt heads with me, true, but that's the folly of youth, and true enough of you too.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: The first thing I ever taught him was that we'll always be of one mind when we stand for Columbia.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: Hey...!
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: The young Rhine researcher can only watch as Gustave takes the report and turns to walk into the interior of the restaurant.
He is shocked and angry. He wants to charge at Gustave, but the man makes a simple gesture, and bodyguards twist the young scientist's arm, causing him to cry out in pain and frustration.
Hello?
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: ...Heh, what a coincidence.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: Sky Jagger is taken outside by the bodyguards, not knowing whether he'll be thrown into one of the lower-level jail cells or locked away in some secret room.
He hears Gustave pick up the phone. The man must be calling Gordon Tannen now. Sky Jagger regrets not leaving a copy of the evidence for Nasti. If he could just get back to the Vivarium—
Suddenly, the pain is gone. The bodyguards let go of him and push him into the elevator to take him away from Cloud.
Hey! You can hear me, right?
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: I swear, I won't say a word about Mr. Tannen's smuggling operation! We really didn't mean to barge into his collection!
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Take a break, Oakley. You keep going like this, they're gonna start getting ideas that the best way to shut someone up is to kill them.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: *sniff*...
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Ugh, you're crying again? Don't worry about it, giving prisoners the silent treatment is normal.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Sounds like you know your prisons...
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Where do you think I got my silver tongue?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Even if I ran into a bunch of Archosauria who couldn't understand a word I was saying and had me surrounded with spears, I could still get my point across with nothing but winks and gestures.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: You really think we can get out of this jail?
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Have you ever been to Bleached Wasteland?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: No... I hear the sandstorms there tear through the toughest metal sheet, and rip flesh from bone in an instant.
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: True. All the guides say it's off-limits for a reason, and no travel agencies take tours there.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: But I didn't want to assume it was impossible just because of hearsay.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Don't tell me you actually went there... and you got out alive?
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: It's a gray desert.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: The scorching sun reflects off the sand. You can see dark-purple cliffs in the distance beyond the dunes, and the cacti grow taller than either of us.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: It is a dangerous place, and you can't even tell what you're standing on when the winds rage. But the sands aren't nearly as sharp as knives.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Incredible...
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: My dad used to say that 'impossible' is just an excuse for the lazy and cowardly.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: I learned from him, and became a guide unlike the others, one who dares to brave the unknown.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: You had a supportive father. I'm jealous.
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: I did...
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: That's why you should pick yourself up, Oakley. I'll grant your wish, and my Banshee client's wish too. Our journey isn't over yet.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Get up, both of you.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: Wh-What are you gonna do? Stay back!
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: ...What's going on?
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Come with me and don't cause any trouble. Mr. Tannen wants to see you.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: What did I say? This isn't the end.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Yes, I understand... I apologize for the trouble, sir.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Screw that condescending old fox! We've got a retirement age in Columbia for a goddamned reason!
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: I'm not his coffee boy anymore! And I'll be damned if I'll let him yell in my face over getting the sugar wrong!
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Mr. Tannen... Five-Four is going to burst if you feed it any more...
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: (Foams at the mouth)
attributes.name: Space Finbeast

attributes.content: Hmph. You take over the feeding.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Not a single thing has worked out! We didn't get those meddling Rhine Lab eggheads out of Propeller Paradise, and now the old fox and Nasti's people know about my side hustle...
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: And those two bastards showed up out of nowhere to ruin most of my Arts unit collection! There's stuff there you can't even get anywhere else!
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Arts unit... hustle...
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: So... you were... smuggling, all that time that you were away on unexplained trips?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: You think it's wrong to help tech firms find their footing in the sky?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: No, it's not my place to judge, but...
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Why are you bringing those two intruders over? Are you planning to... deal with them?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: What's with the angst? I got bigger plans for them than just settling a score.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: No one can take Propeller Paradise away from me without evidence. The rest of my collection needs to be cleared ASAP, before anyone else can intervene.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: You want them to smuggle the contraband out for you?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: But everything that enters or leaves Propeller Paradise is subject to stringent checks, even if you give an expedited order. Besides...
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Besides, the existing channels are out of service because of Engineering's renovation work, and I can't wait that long.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: This is all nasty Nasti's fault for that energy system modification shit. Floating botanical units and Rhine's people are everywhere now.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Wait, Rhine...
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Well, if they're gonna block off my routes, it's only fair that I borrow theirs.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: You mean the engineering tunnel beneath the Rhine Vivarium, used to transport heavy equipment and construction materials?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Exactly. With the Vivarium on lockdown, nothing offers better cover than Rhine turf. I know where the old fox is, but Nasti...
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: I'll take care of Director Lunorey, sir, as long as you ensure the safety of the two intruders.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: You?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: I'm confident I can distract her while you carry out your plan.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: I only need one thing—the Banshee's bone pen that you confiscated from Ferne.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Get a move on. Don't keep Mr. Tannen waiting.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: (Whisper) He's gonna have our heads for ruining his collection room!
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: (Whisper) Just paying money isn't so bad. The real problem is if he wants a 'deal'...
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: We're here.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: I brought them.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: Thank you, sir. You may return to your duties.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Mercia, my client—
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Unfortunately, it seems Mr. Tannen had nothing to do with your client's disappearance. I'll do my best to keep an eye out.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Where did that Banshee go...?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Just go through the door and forget about her for now. Make sure you do exactly what Mr. Tannen tells you, if you ever want to leave Propeller Paradise on your own two feet.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: What's he planning?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: He's going to make you an offer you can't refuse.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Sky Jagger's steps grow slower and slower. He used to dash through this corridor, and his colleagues laughed at him for being impatient.
How could he NOT be impatient?
He did not have the luxury of a traditional education, of having his path paved for him. His family circumstances forced him to waste too much time on things other than research.
But now, he stands on the shoulders of Rhine Lab, at the pinnacle of applied science in Columbia, about to touch the very dome that has witnessed a miracle.
There should not be any obstacles. No one has the right to hold back this great work.
I must tell Director Lunorey about Tannen's secret... and apologize.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Footsteps? I thought all the researchers were evacuated.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Does this thing come off at all? It looks like one of those centrifugal safety membranes that the revolving bar used.
attributes.name: Tester A

attributes.content: Don't touch it if you're not sure. We'll ask our new boss later.
attributes.name: Tester B

attributes.content: Is Nasti still in her office?
attributes.name: Tester A

attributes.content: I heard she was willing to lose the whole Vivarium to save us, and that grumpy kid.
attributes.name: Tester A

attributes.content: Shh, shut your big mouth. Nasti's a good person. That's all we need to know.
attributes.name: Tester B

attributes.content: Grumpy kid... me?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Thank you for your time. I think this is the beginning of a beautiful partnership.
attributes.name: Secretary

attributes.content: You're Gustave's secretary? What are you doing here?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Ah, you must be Sky Jagger...
attributes.name: Secretary

attributes.content: I've finished my business with Director Lunorey. Excuse me.
attributes.name: Secretary

attributes.content: You're back.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: You apologized to Gustave?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: You gave up all of Rhine's engineering control and agreed to stop active inspections?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Rhine Lab has essentially withdrawn from the exhibition and will no longer appear on the catalogue?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: We'll need to store our experiment equipment here later. Come and help, if you have the energy.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Director...
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Yes?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: You knew I would screw up. You knew I was just an average Joe. That's why you kept me busy with inspections and botanical units, right?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: You were right. In the end, I'm just a musbeast in the gutter. I understood greatness, but I could never become part of it.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: To be forgiven, saved, protected... like all the testers here, I'm just an ordinary guy left in the dust. I wouldn't be here without your help.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: I needed new employees and an aide, that's all.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I stayed with a group of pioneers when I first came to Columbia. They despised me for being a Banshee who couldn't use incantations. I despised them for their lousy hunting traps.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: There was no passivity in our interactions. We forgave each other, saved each other, and protected each other.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: As we do now. As it should be.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: The Vivarium is quiet, but the presence of the testers seems to have changed this place of cold, metallic rationality.
A misshapen wire pull tab has been added to the microscope slide box's stubborn lid. A sheet of plywood hangs from the air-conditioning vent, making it a little less unbearably chilly.
A few 'watch out' notes are pasted on the glass door that Sky tends to run into when he is angry.
They remind him of his little sister—
The average, ordinary one who, in his eyes, must always be protected.
He has never turned around to look back at her, not since he witnessed the miracle.
If moving forward means we can't look back, how do we make sure we're still walking the same path that we chose in the beginning?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: What meaning is there in progress if it leads to a future that has been curated for only a select few?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Why should ordinary people be left behind?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I never took you for an orator, Director.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: All I do is state facts. Ask questions, find the solution, repeat.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Get moving, before you let big words and big ideals take you for a ride.
attributes.name: Nasti
